name: Millbrook
descriptionSeed: A riverside farming village on the valley floor, home to a few hundred unaligned folk — Traditionalists, Adaptors, and a handful of Explorers living side by side. Water wheels turn along the Echo River; terraced gardens climb the lower slopes. The village well and the river dock are the two centers of daily life. Lately the water runs faintly gray-green some mornings, and everyone pretends not to notice out loud.
encounterFlavor: Daily village life under quiet strain — farmers arguing about irrigation shares, children playing at sonic and light games they barely control, traders passing through with news.
